upload.title: Upload Video
upload.supportedHelp: Supported: {extensions}. Max {maxMb}MB. Final validation is done by ffprobe.
upload.translationOnlyPlaceholder: Enter Original only when translation is unavailable
upload.translationUnavailableOllama: Ollama is not running. Confirm OLLAMA_BASE_URL.
upload.translationUnavailableOpenAI: OpenAI translation is unavailable because OPENAI_API_KEY is not configured.

batch.supportedHelp: Supported: {extensions}. Max {maxMb}MB per file, up to {maxFiles} files per batch.
batch.removeSilenceHelp: Remove long silent sections before transcription.
batch.tooManyFiles: You can upload up to {maxFiles} files at a time.

recent.subtitle: Last 20 tasks recorded by the backend.
recent.emptyDescription: No tasks have been recorded yet. Upload a video to create a task.
recent.searchPlaceholder: Search by Task ID or filename...
recent.notes: Notes: filenames are recorded at upload time. If this backend was upgraded, older tasks may show only task id.

download.title: Downloads
download.subtitle: Download existing outputs. Rebuilding final.mp4 is explicit and only runs when you click the button.
download.languageHelp: Subtitle downloads require an explicit lang + format. The selector above controls which language is used.
download.noManifestDescription: The results manifest is not available yet. Check task status first.
download.notReadyDescription: The task has not completed yet, so downloads are not available. Go back to the status page and wait for SUCCESS.
download.fallbackWarning: {language} used original text because translation failed: {reason}
download.missingFinalDescription: This can happen if the task did not generate a final video, or if a subtitle was edited and the backend deleted final.mp4 to avoid serving an outdated video.
download.editDoesNotRebuild: Editing subtitles only updates the subtitle file; it does not rebuild/burn the final video automatically.
download.rebuildHelp: This enqueues a background rebuild using the selected language. Track progress on the status page.
download.finalVideoDescription: Download the final video if it exists.
download.translationFailedDescription: Translation failed; this subtitle uses original text.
download.finalVideoLanguageNote: When multiple subtitle languages are generated, final.mp4 burns only the first selected language. Other languages remain available as subtitle downloads.
